summary_line: Advice-only RIA — explicitly does NOT manage assets, only advises on them. $0 regulatory AUM by design, 14 employees, 12 advisors, 0 DRPs. Tagline: 'Minimize Fees. Maximize Life.' Mission: 'change the financial planning industry' via low-cost, transparent, advice-only delivery. Real captured site IA with 6 sub-pages.
regulatory_note: Advice-only by design — Abundo does not take custody or manage assets, so regulatory AUM is $0. Revenue model is subscription / flat-fee planning.

notable_events.event: ADV snapshot via IAPD CRD 304612 — 14 employees, 12 advisors, $0 regulatory AUM (advice-only by design), 0 DRPs. Legal name: 'ABUNDO WEALTH.'

Site capture: extract.ts captured 6 pages (home, about, blog, contact, pricing, services). Hero H1: 'Advice-Only Financial Planning For Everyone.' Mission: 'We're on a Mission to Change the Financial Planning Industry.' Promise: 'Everyone deserves high-quality advice, transparent pricing, and low-cost investing.' Three pillars: Work with a Trusted Partner, Build a Plan You Love, Always Feel Supported. Tagline: 'Minimize Fees. Maximize Life.' About page H1: 'We're a passionate group of people working to build the future of Financial Planning.' Site IA: /what-to-expect, /our-story, /pricing (anchored at /#pricing), services, blog, contact. Pricing page captured but body was empty (JS-rendered) — exact dollar tiers need follow-up. 'Advisors Accepting Clients' section on about page suggests multi-advisor onboarding model.

_schema._applicability: Abundo's aum_usd = 0 is correct (advice-only); fee_aum_pct fields null intentionally.
